hero.headline: Did you see that? I think your revenue engine just misfired.
hero.subhead: We don’t build websites; we build proprietary machines that sit on your balance sheet. Identify your leaks and orchestrate your engine with a certified PMP.

stages.title: Fragmented (0-40)
stages.description: Your engine is a collection of isolated musicians with no shared sheet music.

stages.title: Emerging (41-60)
stages.description: The first indicators of digital cohesion are visible but fragile.

stages.title: Orchestrated (61-80)
stages.description: A Managed Nervous System is in place. Visibility is high, but sovereignty is still missing.

stages.title: Unified (81-100)
stages.description: A complete Sovereign Engine. Self-healing, proprietary, and compounding.

social_proof.title: The Alabrida Bridge
social_proof.description: Every agency we guide serves as a living proof of the Alabrida philosophy, documenting the transition from a 'Frankenstein Stack' to a Unified Engine.

about.title: The Navigator
about.name: Richard Norwood, PMP
about.bio: Where Alabrida is the industrial shipyard, Richard is the professional captain. Operating as your 'Air Traffic Controller', he establishes the Managed Nervous System to stop leaks before a full-scale cloud migration is required.
